name: blueprint-driven-project-runner
description: Control long-running Codex projects with executable blueprints, execution ledgers, bounded goal prompts, and evidence gates.

interface.shortDescription: Stop long-running Codex projects from drifting.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin and skill for turning vague project goals into executable blueprint records, row-by-row execution ledgers, bounded goal prompts, execution contracts, and evidence-based progress reports.
defaultPrompt: Create an executable blueprint before implementation.
Generate a bounded goal prompt from ready blueprint records.
Recover control of a drifting long-running Codex project.
